🏠 Asset Value Projection Annual appreciation / depreciation rates
▾
Set an expected annual rate of change per asset. Positive = appreciation, negative = depreciation. The 36-month net worth chart will reflect these changes.
⚖️ Scenario A / B Compare two financial paths side by side
▾
💡 How to use this
Step 1: Set up your current plan using Variables, Goals, Events and the Loan Planner.
Step 2: Click 📸 Save as Scenario B — this freezes a snapshot of your current projection.
Step 3: Change something — add a new expense, remove a goal, change a variable.
Step 4: The chart below compares both paths. Scenario A is always your live current setup. Scenario B is the frozen snapshot you saved.
Example: "What if I take on a 500 DH/mo new expense?" → save B → add the variable → see the net worth gap in 3 years.
🟡 Scenario A — Live
Your current setup (always up to date)
—
net worth in 36 months
🔵 Scenario B — Snapshot
